\tzpentry{ID4926}{Coupled Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4926 introduces Coupled Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}[\rho] = -i[\hat{H}, \rho] + \sum \gamma_j \mathcal{D}[\hat{L}_j, \rho] \end{equation}
